sections.content:
All green blocks are cleared! The image shows:
- No green blocks remaining
- 3 purple blocks with yellow dots still visible (middle area)
- Player at same position
- The level is not yet completed (still on level 2)
Now I need to figure out what to do with the purple/yellow blocks. These might be the next target, or there might be another mechanic. Let me check the current state more carefully.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# All green blocks cleared! Check remaining objects
nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("Non-background objects:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] > 10 and n['color'] != 'B' and n['color'] != 'S' and n['color'] != 'G':
        cols = sorted([p[1] for p in n['boundary']])
        rows = sorted([p[0] for p in n['boundary']])
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, rows={rows[0]}-{rows[-1]}, cols={cols[0]}-{cols[-1]}, children={n['children']}")

# Also check for small colored objects
small_colors = ['N', 'b', 'Y', 'M', 'P', 'R', 'w']
for c in small_colors:
    objs = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == c]
    if objs:
        print(f"Color {c}: {len(objs)} objects")
        for n in objs:
            cols = sorted([p[1] for p in n['boundary']])
            rows = sorted([p[0] for p in n['boundary']])
            print(f"  rows={rows[0]}-{rows[-1]}, cols={cols[0]}-{cols[-1]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
